---
name: html-animation
description: Generates a self-contained interactive HTML animation for a math concept. Use when asked to create an animation, interactive visualization, or HTML demo for a math topic.
---

Generate a fully self-contained HTML file (all CSS and JavaScript inline, no external libraries) with an interactive animation illustrating the following math concept.

Requirements:
- At least one interactive control (slider or button) that changes the visualization
- Canvas-based or SVG drawing of the concept
- Display key numerical values updating in real time
- A title and one-sentence description at the top
- Clean, readable academic layout

Concept and any specific requirements: {{input}}
